title: universal modpack
description: universal modpack client created as a base for your modpack
body:
### this modpack will be supported but I don't promise that it will be on all versions
### 



**this modpack is a base for your modpack,
the best balance between performance, smoothness of the GUI and functionality,
suitable for almost anyone who wants to create their own modpack for personal use or as a base for a public modpack.
p.s. in the description of your public modpack insert a link to this modpack**


# You can see the exact list of mods,resource pack and shaders in the changelog









**if you want to help with something or suggest your mod or another mod 
(which can be used in modpacks without the owner's permission) write to me at these contacts
telegram:https://t.me/Foxz_n or
discord:foxz_n**





### If you are the creator of a mod, resource pack or shader
###  and you are not satisfied with its presence in this modpack,
### then contact me at these contacts gmail: Sorry, I've lost my email at the moment, I'll write my full contact details a little later
